repo.description: Several optimization methods of half-precision general matrix multiplication (HGEMM) using tensor core with WMMA API and MMA PTX instruction.

terms.context_snippet: Several optimization methods of half-precision general matrix multiplication (HGEMM) using tensor core with WMMA API and MMA PTX instruction. The calculation expression is as follows, where the precision of matrix A (M * K), B (K * N) and C (M * N) is FP16. Through exploring var…
